workItem.author: marius-patrik
workItem.title: Converge released submodule pointers
workItem.body: Reconcile a verified released child pointer through the normal parent pull request and release lane.
comments: Never select a development head or initialize child code with privileged credentials.

policy.branching: One worker = one issue = one branch = one PR; release through a temporary protected release branch.
policy.enforcement: Every pointer requires released-child ancestry, green gates, normal review, and downstream verification.

facts: The child released head is accessible, green, and a descendant of the current parent gitlink.
